summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No security-sensitive items were detected. No merge recommendation is safe from the artifact because required merge preflight is incomplete: mergeability is unknown, Codex /review proof is absent, and PR comments/review-bot comments were not hydrated. One PR also has a failing required check in the expanded fix artifact.

actions.reason: Independent maintainer-review PR; keep open and do not recommend merge without complete merge preflight.
Independent feature PR; keep open for maintainer review because merge gates are not fully proven.
Human or a repair worker with full check logs should decide the narrow repair before merge; the failure blocks merge and the artifact lacks enough detail for an executable fix artifact.
Independent session-state PR; keep open because merge requires full review/comment preflight despite passing checks.
Independent provider/context fix PR; keep open for maintainer review because complete merge preflight is missing.

needs_human: #93176: failing check-prod-types blocks merge, and the artifact lacks the failure log plus review/comment hydration needed to define a concrete repair safely.
